Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Assignment Order; Ntc Of Non-Appearance
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF ONE 3 TWO, INC. DBA OBEY CLOTHING's Motion For Assignment Order is Off calendar. Insufficient service per CCP 1005(b), which requires at least 16 court days for notice of hearing, plus an additional 10 calendar days if the place of address is outside the State of California. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
